pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source property to target Java 11.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the compiler defaults to Java 8 source level, preventing the use of Java 11 language features and potentially causing compatibility issues with Java 11 libraries.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler target property to target Java 11.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the compiler generates bytecode for Java 8, which may not be compatible with Java 11 runtime expectations or optimizations.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Jakarta Inject API dependency to replace removed javax.inject in Java 11.
pom.xml.why_exists: javax.inject was part of the Java EE module system removed in Java 11; without adding the Jakarta Inject API, classes using @Inject will fail to compile or run with NoClassDefFoundError.
